title: Lab 46: Container Load And Inspect
description: Load a provided container image into user storage and inspect its metadata with podman.

tasks.title: Create user scope46 with password cinder9 if it
tasks.prompt: Create user scope46 with password cinder9 if it does not already exist.

tasks.title: load the image archive /opt/rhcsa/container-
tasks.prompt: As user scope46, load the image archive /opt/rhcsa/container-assets/rhcsa-httpd-base.tar into local storage.

tasks.title: inspect localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest and write
tasks.prompt: As user scope46, inspect localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest and write the configured working directory to /home/scope46/workdir.txt.

tasks.title: If the image has no explicit configured user, write
tasks.prompt: If the image has no explicit configured user, write root to /home/scope46/user.txt. Otherwise write the configured user value.
solution_commands: runuser -l scope46 -c "sh -c 'u=$(podman image inspect localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest --format {{.Config.User}}); printf %s \"${u:-root}\" > ~/user.txt'"
